positive: Minimalist geometric cityscape silhouette, viewed at dusk. The composition should feature a strong vertical axis and a central focal point, representing a stylized cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with sharp, elegant lines. The sky gradient shifts from deep indigo to soft violet, creating a high contrast against the deep black silhouettes of the buildings. Incorporate subtle, glowing accents of neon teal and warm amber emanating from the windows and structural joints. The overall aesthetic must be clean, high-contrast, and suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Focus on depth and rhythm through the stacked geometry. Style: Clean Vector Art meets Neo-Tokyo vaporwave, highly detailed, symmetrical, ultra-sharp edges, digital ink wash.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, low detail, noisy, grainy, ugly, worst quality, distorted, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, jpeg artifacts, color bleed, photo realistic
